titles.title: He Is Good (I Know a Good God)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v2 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know a good God, I have a Father, He is my daily bread my living water, I have a promise He will deliver, I'm satisfied I'm satisfied, 'Cause He is good.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And from the mountain to the valley, He is good, On my best days and worst ones, He is good, And from glory to glory, He is good, Oh taste and see, That He is good, I'm satisfied I'm satisfied, Cause He is good.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the mountain to the valley, He is good, On my best days and worst ones, He is good, And from glory to glory, He is good, Oh taste and see That He is good, I'm satisfied I'm satisfied, Cause He is good,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're sweeter than the honey, From the honeycomb, Sweeter than the honey, From the Honeycomb.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're sweeter than the honey From the honeycomb, Sweeter than the honey From the Honeycomb, Taste and see that He is.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Sweeter than the honey From the honeycomb, Sweeter than the honey From the Honeycomb, Taste and see that He is.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Jesus is the sweetest name I've ever known, Jesus is the sweetest name I've ever known, Taste and see that He is.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Sweeter than the honey From the honeycomb, Sweeter than the honey From the Honeycomb.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Sweeter than the honey From the honeycomb, Sweeter than the honey From the Honeycomb, Taste and see.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: He is so good so good So good to me.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: My God is so good, so good, I'm satisfied I'm satisfied Cause He is good.
